test.name: CT006 Deve poder logar com um usário pré-cadastrado

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\marce\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\PROJETOS\\pb-compass\\Sprint_07\\QAx\\projects\\mark85-robot-express\\logs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\10ffe93d-7bba-4264-94b5-9ffb44bf1ca2"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Remove user from database
kw.msg: REMOVE USER BY ct006@mail.com REMOVIDO COM SUCESSO!!.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'ct006@mail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pwd123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Split String
kw.doc: Splits the ``string`` using ``separator`` as a delimiter string.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=header .right small at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

kw.arg: Ocorreu um erro ao fazer login, verifique suas credenciais.

suite.doc: Cenário de testes do cadastro de usuários

test.name: CT008 Deve poder cadastrado uma nova tarefa

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.msg: ${data} = {'create': {'user': {'name': 'TestCT008 Json', 'email': 'ct008@mail.com', 'password': 'pwd123'}, 'task': {'name': 'Criar uma nova versÃ£o do Ipod (CT008)', 'tasks': ['ios', 'music', 'ipod']}}}
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: {'create': {'user': {'name': 'TestCT008 Json', 'email': 'ct008@mail.com', 'password': 'pwd123'}, 'task': {'name': 'Criar uma nova versÃ£o do Ipod (CT008)', 'tasks': ['ios', 'music', 'ipod']}}}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
